10#include "MSP430.h"
11#include "llvm/IR/Module.h"
12#include "llvm/Support/TargetRegistry.h"
13using namespace llvm;
14
15Target llvm::TheMSP430Target;
16
17extern "C" void LLVMInitializeMSP430TargetInfo() {
18 RegisterTarget<Triple::msp430>
19 X(TheMSP430Target, "msp430", "MSP430 [experimental]");
20}
